category_title: High-achieving Latino students who disassociate from academic labels through mischief
scenario_title: Answering questions during a science lesson with a classroom visitor
minimal_context: José is participating in a whole-class science lesson while the principal is visiting.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Class, let's review our science lesson while the principal is visiting. Who can tell me the answer to the first question?

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Screaming out the answer) I know it!

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Please remember to raise your hand.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: Because I want to answer the questions. You tell me to raise my hand, but you always pick other persons.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Screaming out the answers to the next questions) I know the rest of them! I'm going to say everything that I know!

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: Class, let's review our science lesson while the principal is visiting. Who can tell me the answer to the first question?

STUDENT: (Screaming out the answer) I know it!

TUTOR: Please remember to raise your hand.

STUDENT: Because I want to answer the questions. You tell me to raise my hand, but you always pick other persons.

TUTOR: Okay. Let other people talk.

STUDENT: (Screaming out the answers to the next questions) I know the rest of them! I'm going to say everything that I know!

task.content: Answering questions during a science lesson

context.social_setting: Whole class instruction with the principal visiting the classroom

challenging_behavior_trigger.condition: When wanting to showcase his intelligence in front of his peers and other adults in a seemingly safe way
challenging_behavior_trigger.observable_behavior: Screaming out answers in front of the principal instead of raising his hand
challenging_behavior_trigger.internal_state: Seemed to enjoy the fact that Mr. Ortiz recognized his intelligence, but sought visibility and notoriety through travesuras (mischievous behaviors)
related_quotes: I even screamed it out. And he said, 'Okay. Let other people talk.' But I still said everything that I knew.
Because I want to answer the questions. ...Because [Mr. Ortiz] was telling me to raise my hand, but they [the teachers] always pick other persons.

behavior_patterns.condition: When confronted about his academic performance or when trying to mask his intelligence
behavior_patterns.observable_behavior: Exaggeratedly turned his head away to follow a distraction with his gaze, smiled, and claimed he was distracted
behavior_patterns.internal_state: Downplaying intelligence to avoid being authored as a schoolboy
related_quotes: What did you say? See! I got distracted!
I’m distracted…. I can’t concentrate…. I have ADD, Miss!
